title: Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur

overview.short: Siddheshwar Temple is a temple in Solapur district, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Siddheshwar Temple is a temple in Solapur district, Maharashtra, India. It is sacred to Hindus, especially the members of the Lingayat denomination. There is a lake within the temple complex.

topPlaces.name: Indira Gandhi Stadium (Solapur)
topPlaces.description: The Indira Gandhi Stadium is located in Solapur, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The venue has a capacity of 30,000 and most of the places are standing places.

topPlaces.name: Solapur
topPlaces.description: Solapur () is a city located in the south-western region of the Indian state of Maharashtra, close to its border with Karnataka. Solapur is located on a major highway, rail routes between Mumbai, Pune, Bangalore and Hyderabad, with a branch line to the cities of Kalaburagi and Vijayapura in the neighbouring state of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Ekrukh Dam
topPlaces.description: Ekrukh dam, is an earthfill dam on Adela river near north Solapur in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Kumbhari, Solapur
topPlaces.description: Kumbhari is a village in Solapur district, Maharashtra, India. It lies on the suburbs of Solapur, about 12 kilometres east of the city center.

items.note: The Indira Gandhi Stadium is located in Solapur, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. The venue has a capacity of 30,000 and most of the places are standing places.

Solapur () is a city located in the south-western region of the Indian state of Maharashtra, close to its border with Karnataka. Solapur is located on a major highway, rail routes between Mumbai, Pune, Bangalore and Hyderabad, with a branch line to the cities of Kalaburagi and Vijayapura in the neighbouring state of Karnataka.
Ekrukh dam, is an earthfill dam on Adela river near north Solapur in the state of Maharashtra in India.
Kumbhari is a village in Solapur district, Maharashtra, India. It lies on the suburbs of Solapur, about 12 kilometres east of the city center.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (205 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (0 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur?
faq.a: Stays in Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Siddheshwar Temple, Solapur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Indira Gandhi Stadium (Solapur), Solapur, Ekrukh Dam, Kumbhari, Solapur.
